title: RadioSpatialSignalReceipt
description: Receipt for radio-spatial signal collection such as Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, AWDL, Nearby, location, motion, HomeKit, Matter, or Thread observations. Raw identifiers must be redacted or hashed unless explicitly exported by the user.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. 2.1.0.

collector.description: Daemon, service, app, or component that collected or observed the signal.

rawIdentifiersRedacted.description: True when SSIDs, BSSIDs, MACs, home IDs, accessory IDs, and equivalent identifiers are redacted or hashed.

rawValuesCollected.description: True only when the receipt payload contains raw signal values rather than presence/count/hash evidence.

timestampWindow.description: ISO 8601 interval or timestamp window covered by this receipt.

userVisible.description: Whether the user-facing Context Receipts surface exposes this receipt.

revocationPolicy.description: Policy or control used to disable future collection or revoke the derived context.

evidenceRefs.description: Evidence references, hashes, or provenance links.
